original_image_tags: A dark, slightly grainy scan of a typed checklist form. The title "RESTRICTED" is stamped in large, faded capital letters at the top and bottom. The text is white against a black or very dark background. There are two hole-punch marks on the left margin.

elements.description: A typed document titled 'CHECK-LIST - UNIDENTIFIED FLYING OBJECTS' with the word 'RESTRICTED' stamped at the top and bottom. It contains numbered fields filled with text, such as Date: 17 Sept 1947, Location: Alaska (Ft Richardson (?)), and Incident # 72. There are two punch holes on the left side and a small handwritten number '156' at the bottom right.

judge.reason: Both agree on a typed checklist form with 'RESTRICTED' stamps at top and bottom and two hole-punch marks on the left, but Description B adds specific quoted text (title, dates, locations) not present in Description A without contradicting its claims.
